Once upon a time, there was a little dog named Spot. Spot loved to run and play with his friends. One day, Spot saw a big red balloon in the park. He wanted to buy it from his friend, Anna.
Spot and Anna went to Anna's house to look for the balloon. Spot saw the balloon and said, "Look, Anna! I found this big red balloon! It's so pretty!" Anna said, "Wow! That's so nice! We can play with it."
The next day, Spot and Anna went to the park to play with the balloon. They played with the balloon all day. Spot learned that it's important to share and help others in the park. And from that day on, Spot always made good friends and play with his new red balloon.

Once upon a time, there was a little dog named Max. Max loved to play with his ball. One day, Max saw a big, round thing on the ground. He wanted to open it and see what was inside.
Max called his friend, a little girl named Lily. "Hey Max!" said Lily, "I can open the box." Max opened the box, and inside was a big, soft pillow. Lily looked at the pillow and said, "Oh no! You look so scary!"
Lily felt sad for Max. "Don't forget, Max. It's a warm blanket. Let's open it!" Max held up the pillow under his fur and then they opened the door. Inside, they found a magic pillow and a magic pillow. Max and Lily were so happy! They played with the magic pillow all day and had lots of fun.

They walked to the boy's house. He looked around, but he couldn't find his toy. The boy was sad because he had no toy to play with. Then, something unexpected happened. The boy's mom showed him how to chew on the toy and chew on it. From that day on, Spot was never grumpy again.
